Flu.causes: Influenza virus infection affecting the respiratory system.
Flu.actions: Rest, hydration, and antiviral medications if prescribed by a doctor.

COVID-19.actions: Self-isolate, monitor oxygen levels, and seek medical help if breathing becomes difficult.

Viral Infection.causes: General viral pathogens affecting various body systems.
Viral Infection.actions: Symptomatic treatment, rest, and fluid intake.

Migraine.causes: Neurological triggers, stress, or hormonal changes.
Migraine.actions: Rest in a dark room, hydration, and over-the-counter pain relief.

Heart Issue.causes: Cardiovascular strain or underlying heart disease.
Heart Issue.actions: Seek emergency medical attention immediately. Do not delay.

Healthy.causes: No active disease detected based on provided symptoms.
Healthy.actions: Continue maintaining a balanced diet and regular exercise.
